name: Raspberry-Chocolate Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen Raspberries (10 ozs), thawed and undrained
self-rising flour can be used in this recipe; omit salt and baking soda.
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees. Mix flour, sugar, and margarine. Press into an ungreased rectangular pan (13 X 9 X 2 inches). Bake for 15 minutes.
Mix raspberries, orange juice, and cornstarch in a quart saucepan over medium heat. Bring to boiling point, stirring constantly. Continue boiling for one minute, then allow to cool for ten minutes.
Sprinkle chocolate chips over the crust. Pour the raspberry mixture over the chocolate chips. Bake for an additional 20 minutes or until the raspberry mixture is set. Refrigerate until the chocolate is firm. Drizzle with extra melted chocolate if desired. Cut into 2 X 1-inch bars (48 total; approximately 70 calories per bar).
